# Mannan Javid

> Multi-disciplinary engineer, founder, and student. Personal portfolio at mannan.is — security, geospatial, healthcare, and AI-forward product engineering, with a long-running practice in health, community, and applied psychology. This file gives AI agents a structured summary so you don't have to scrape the rendered site.

Multi-disciplinary engineer, leader, and student. I've shipped products across non-profits, government, and commercial teams — and I measure success by the strength of the people around me. Based in Alexandria, Virginia.

This file is generated from the same data that powers the MCP server below (updated 2026-06-13). The site is a single-page Next.js portfolio with sibling routes for essays, curated readings, products, and interactive pages.

## MCP server

- [MCP endpoint (Streamable HTTP)](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/mcp): Query this data as 10 read-only MCP tools. Claude Code: `claude mcp add --transport http mannan https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/mcp`. claude.ai: Settings > Connectors > paste the URL. Documents (resume, papers) are agent-fetchable via the agentUrl fields from get_downloads.
- [MCP guide for humans and agents](https://mannan.is/mcp): Connect instructions, tool catalog, and what data is served.
- [MCP server card](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Machine-readable server metadata.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://mannan.is/): One-page portfolio — hero, about, narrative chapters, contact.
- [Garden](https://mannan.is/garden): Essays, products, and curated readings in one explorer.
- [MCP](https://mannan.is/mcp): How to connect an agent to this site's data.
- [Floating Chicken Game](https://mannan.is/game): Floating chicken game — click it, it screams; keep clicking and it evolves through five saiyan-style forms.

## Mission and goals

- [Narrative — Wellbeing by Design](https://mannan.is/#about): Engineering is not neutral. Every system either improves or diminishes human wellbeing. My work deliberately chooses the former — building products that serve millions securely, making healthcare more accessible, and eliminating the failures that frustrate real people. The through-line across every role: technology in service of people.
- [Narrative — Impact at Scale](https://mannan.is/#about): 3M+ daily users served with zero security incidents. 40% faster code reviews. 33% fewer defects. 100K API failures eliminated. 20% increase in healthcare access. Measured not by lines shipped, but by lives improved.
- [Narrative — In The Arena](https://mannan.is/#about): It is not the critic who counts. I ship products, teach students, volunteer in communities, found startups, build robots, and hold space for others to grow. Multi-disciplinary by practice, not by label. Not theorizing. Building.
- [Narrative — Continue](https://mannan.is/#about): Ready to build something that matters?
- [Goal — Build technology in service of human wellbeing](https://mannan.is): "Engineering is not neutral. Every system either improves or diminishes human wellbeing. My work deliberately chooses the former"
- [Goal — Treat health and longevity as a personal north star](https://mannan.is/garden/article/health-longevity): "A decade of health optimization, reversing prediabetes, and why wellbeing became my north star."
- [Goal — Measure impact in lives improved, at scale](https://mannan.is): "Measured not by lines shipped, but by lives improved."
- [Goal — Ship AI products as a founder](https://mannan.is): "AI product studio"
- [Goal — Build community and help others grow](https://mannan.is): "I measure success by the strength of the people around me"
- [Goal — Stay in the arena — multi-disciplinary by practice](https://mannan.is): "I ship products, teach students, volunteer in communities, found startups, build robots, and hold space for others to grow."
- [Goal — Find people to build with](https://mannan.is): "Ready to build something that matters?"

## Employment

- [Spirit & Hammer — Founder, 2025-Present](https://mannan.is/#about): AI product studio & consulting agency — production-grade, full-stack AI platforms. Skills: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, Vercel AI SDK, Claude, MCP, Cloudflare.
- [Capital One — Principal Software Engineer, 2024-2025, 2021-2022](https://www.capitalone.com/): Security & platform engineering for apps serving 3M+ daily users. Zero incidents. Skills: Security, Splunk, New Relic, PagerDuty, Springboot, Astro, SolidJS, Node.js, DevSecOps.
- [Publicis Sapient — Senior Software Engineer, 2022-2023](https://www.publicissapient.com/): Led developers and feature rewrites — shipped ahead of schedule, raised company-wide velocity. Skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, ArcGIS, AWS, Java, leadership.
- [Radiant (now Maxar) — Software Engineer II, 2018-2022](https://www.maxar.com/): Frontend engineer on mapping systems for national security. Culture champion. Skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Cesium, LeafletJS, ArcGIS, AWS, culture.
- [MITRE Corporation — Software Engineer I, 2016-2018](https://www.mitre.org/): Engineer and researcher on national cloud, cyber-security, and tax-system initiatives. Skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Python, Python Django, AWS, research.
- [Meal Fairy, LLC — Founder, 2018 (self-employed)](https://meal-fairy-ce3bf.web.app/): Founder of a plate-to-door food delivery startup in the greater Washington DC area. Skills: Javascript, Typescript, Angular, Firebase, Stripe, startup, marketing.
- [America's Electric Cooperatives — Software Engineer, 2014-2016 (contract)](https://www.electric.coop/): Fullstack engineer for America's cooperatives — sustainable energy generation and cutting-edge research . Skills: Javascript, jQuery, Python, Python-Flask, research.

## Extracurriculars

- [Substitute Teacher — Substitute Teacher, 2024](https://mannan.is/#about): Taught and assisted across elementary, middle, and high schools in Fairfax County and Southern Bethesda — English and Math, including emotionally limited and special-needs students.
- [Volunteering — Volunteering, 2013-present](https://mannan.is/#about): Service across many initiatives: food drives, STEM students' Lego Mindstorm & ARCHR robotics demos, and local efforts for the underserved.
- [Nomadic Travel — Nomadic Travel, 2020-2023](https://mannan.is/#about): Lived nomadically from the West Coast to Hawaii — stewarding sustainability in California and Hawaii ecovillages, car-camping across national parks in Washington, Oregon, and California.
- [Applied Jung — Community Building, 2021-present](https://appliedjung.com): Community building and Jungian individuation work — holding a space for men to learn healthy models of masculinity.

## Writing by Mannan

- [Seeking Community](https://mannan.is/garden/article/seeking-community): From Cosmos to car camping to Hawaii — a journey through spirituality, community, and finding guiding principles. (2026-04-07)
- [Health is an Artform](https://mannan.is/garden/article/health-longevity): A decade of health optimization, reversing prediabetes, and why wellbeing became my north star. (2026-03-15)
- [Joyful Frustrations](https://mannan.is/garden/article/funny-frustrations): Can frustration be joyful? Yes it sure can

## Curated readings (authored by others)

- [Be Courageously You — Faizan Ishaq](https://mannan.is/episodes/be-courageously-you): Curated reading on mannan.is; authored by Faizan Ishaq, not by Mannan Javid.
- [Immortalism Manifesto — Bryan Johnson](https://mannan.is/episodes/immortalism-manifesto): Curated reading on mannan.is; authored by Bryan Johnson, not by Mannan Javid.

## Products

- [Mannan](https://mannan.is/): Portfolio, writing, and experiments — my corner of the web.
- [Sun Signal](https://sunsignal.app): Turn any US ZIP into real-time circadian timing.
- [Read Along](https://tryreadalong.com): Turn text into AI-narrated audiobooks.
- [Event Every](https://eventevery.com): Turn image or text into calendar events.
- [SkillGuard](https://skillguard.sh): Scan Claude Code skills for prompt injection before they run.
- [claude-cues](https://claude-cues.pages.dev): Gentle sounds that tell you what Claude Code is doing.
- [Mannan MCP](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev): Connect any AI agent to my site's public data.
- [Meal Fairy (retired)](https://meal-fairy-ce3bf.web.app): Chef-cooked, healthy meals delivered to your door.
- [Floating Chicken Game](https://mannan.is/game): Floating chicken game — click it, it screams; keep clicking and it evolves through five saiyan-style forms.

## Research and publications

- [Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/files/gmu-archr): A haptic teleoperation system for high-DOF humanoid robots, letting untrained operators control complex robots for disaster response. Submitted to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015; taken to the DARPA Robotics Challenge. (publication)
- [Open Modeling Framework Demand Response](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/files/omf-dr): A cost-benefit model for demand-response programs at rural electric cooperatives, built on NRECA's Open Modeling Framework — simulating TOU, CPP, PTR, and DLC programs. (publication)
- [Apparatus for Remote Control of Humanoid Robots](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/files/gmu-archr): Lead developer of a haptic teleoperation system for high-DOF humanoid robots, letting untrained operators control complex robots for disaster response. One-to-one hand-puppeteered mimicry over Oculus VR streaming, driving ARCHR, Mini-Hubo, and Baxter. Published to IEEE/RSJ IROS 2015; taken to the DARPA Robotics Challenge. (university-project)
- [Solar Workspace](https://mannan.is/#about): Lead CAD designer (Solidworks wiring schematics and 3D mechanicals) for a solar-powered outdoor study hub — the university's first multi-disciplinary engineering project, uniting electrical, mechanical, and civil students on a sustainable campus installation. (university-project)
- [DC Dome Light](https://mannan.is/#about): Research project designing a portable dome light in Solidworks 3D, with wiring schematics, for the travel industry. (university-project)

## Documents

- [Resume](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/files/resume): Agent-fetchable. Human browser link: https://mannan.is/api/download/resume
- [Cover Letter](https://mcp.mannanteam.workers.dev/files/cover-letter): Agent-fetchable. Human browser link: https://mannan.is/api/download/cover-letter
